## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 sentences.

## Type of Change

- [ ] docs content update
- [ ] workflow or prompt update
- [ ] MCP or security guidance update
- [ ] site UI or HonKit theme change
- [ ] validation or CI change
- [ ] community or repository metadata change

## Pages and Files Affected

List the main files or sections changed.

## Primary Sources Used

List official docs, repositories, release notes, or specs used to support factual claims.

## Verification Performed

Commands run locally:

```bash
# paste commands here
```

## URL and Navigation Stability

- [ ] I preserved existing public URLs, or documented the reason for any change
- [ ] I updated `docs/SUMMARY.md` when navigation changed
- [ ] I checked changed headings or anchors that could affect deep links

## Documentation Validation

- [ ] `npm run docs:validate`
- [ ] `npm run docs:build`
- [ ] links added in this PR were checked
- [ ] local-path scan passes
- [ ] required metadata stays valid

## Security Impact

- [ ] no security impact
- [ ] security guidance changed
- [ ] permissions or least-privilege recommendations changed
- [ ] sensitive content handling was reviewed

If security guidance changed, summarize the impact.

## Visual Changes

- [ ] no visual change
- [ ] screenshots attached for site UI or layout changes

## Definition of Done

- [ ] claims are backed by primary sources or clearly marked as unverified
- [ ] examples remain safe and copy-pasteable
- [ ] verification labels are honest
- [ ] no secrets or local absolute filesystem paths were introduced
